843 PREFRD_LANG_TXT PREFRD_LANG_TXT A1110A Preferred language CHAR 15 The data in this column is the resident's preferred language. effective 10/01/2023
844 NEED_WNT_INTRPTR_CD NEED_WNT_INTRPTR_CD A1110B Does the patient need or want an interpreter CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident needs or wants an interpreter to communicate with a doctor or health care staff. 0=No
1=Yes
9=Unable to determine effective 10/01/2023
845 TRNSPRTN_MDCL_CD
